purpose: Provide a maintained positive suite fixture with one explicit member and direct closure evidence.

routing.conflict_resolution: Use direct suite fixture evidence and keep the result bounded.

shared_evidence_rules: Direct member evidence is required for checked member status.
Progress ledgers, runtime ids, and PM text cannot satisfy suite closure.

current_notes: The fixture uses the current suite map and suite contract schema shapes.
The fixture is positive-only and intentionally avoids broad release claims.

validation_layers: Schema validation through local suite record commands.
Suite member path and evidence checks through local check-suite command.
Closure data review against direct evidence files.
maintenance_ownership: Refresh this suite fixture after schema, member path, evidence freshness, or closure-policy changes.
skipped_checks: Negative, stale, and multi-member cases are outside this positive fixture.
residual_risk: This suite contract covers one positive member and does not exercise all suite branch behavior.
claim_boundary: This suite contract covers only the good_suite positive fixture records, member path, and direct evidence files. It does not prove runtime checker execution, fixture coverage, CLI checks, tests, suite automation, package publication, code-contract validation, release readiness, or future AI behavior without separate current evidence.
